text:
i keep thinking i want the models to be cheaper/faster more than i want them to be smarter

but it seems that just being smarter is still the most important thing

Naval identified the real shift that 99% of the vibe coding conversation is missing.

The skill that matters now isn’t coding. It isn’t prompting either. It’s product taste. 

The ability to look at what the AI built and know whether it’s right. To describe what “right” means

RT @godofprompt: Everyone calling AI "intelligent" should read what happened to the weavers.

In 1806, a skilled handloom weaver in England…

RT @rileybrown: The Codex Super-App (Full Beginners Guide)
The All Purpose Interface for AI Agents

Part 1: Codex Basics
Install Codex, Pro…
